legend.automated: Verified in the authoring DOM by an it() block.
legend.deferred: Documented as it.skip() — requires login/activity bootstrap, runtime submit/validation, persistence-after-reload, post-submit CLIC iframe, Preview/Reader/CLP, responsive, or lifecycle flows.

mappings.reason: Launch Studio URL + listing page — environment bootstrap handled by cy.openAuthoringTool, not a component assertion
Create math activity (basic info) — activity-creation flow outside authoring DOM
Start authoring redirect — activity-creation flow outside authoring DOM

mappings.it: TC_04 — CLIC pop-up shows the "CLIC Assignment" title (icon-clic catalog widget)
mappings.note: Widgets-tray icon is catalogued as iconClass 'icon-clic'; the dropped pop-up title is asserted

mappings.it: TC_05/TC_06 — CLIC component is placed and its pop-up form is displayed
TC_05/TC_06 — CLIC component is placed and its pop-up form is displayed
mappings.note: Element drops onto the unrestricted Instructions canvas (no Generic Step column required)

mappings.reason: CLIC blocked in non-generic step types — step-type provisioning + negative drop flow (not provisioned in this harness)

mappings.it: TC_08 — Pop-up exposes CLIC Identifier, Instance Name, and Submit button

mappings.reason: Submit disabled / validation when both fields empty — Submit has no ng-disabled binding; enforced at submit runtime (required), not author DOM
Validation message "CLIC Identifier is required" — runtime submit validation
Validation message "Instance Name is required" — runtime submit validation

mappings.it: TC_12 — Both fields accept valid alphanumeric input

mappings.reason: Submit saves data + pop-up closes — runtime submit + iframe swap (submitCLIC → issubmitted)
UI spacing/alignment/padding vs Figma — visual design assertion

mappings.it: TC_15 — Fields accept special characters (no client-side block in author DOM)
mappings.note: field accepts @#$%; server-side validation is a runtime/save check (deferred)

mappings.it: TC_16 — Long (100+ char) input is accepted by the Identifier field
mappings.note: input retained; CSS truncation/wrapping is a visual check (deferred)

mappings.reason: Submit triggers backend/save request — network/save flow (runtime)
Edit values after re-opening component — persistence + re-open flow
CLIC retained after save/preview/re-edit — save + Preview flow
Activity with CLIC can be published — Publish flow outside authoring DOM
Responsive pop-up behavior across screen sizes — responsive/visual flow
Max-allowed CLIC instances limit enforced (if any) — multi-instance + runtime limit
Clicking outside the pop-up closes/ignores gracefully — runtime usability behavior
CLIC Identifier retained after activity save — persistence/save flow
CLIC auto-launches on activity re-open — re-open + iframe auto-launch
No prompt again after relaunch unless edited — re-open state flow
CLIC persists after logout/login — session + persistence flow
Editing Identifier persists across relaunch — persistence + re-open flow
CLIC auto-launches in Preview with saved Identifier — Preview/iframe flow
CLIC inactive/prompts if Identifier not entered before save — runtime save-state flow
Multiple CLIC instances with distinct Identifiers across relaunches — multi-instance + persistence
No data loss on relaunch with CLIC + extra content — persistence-after-reload
Saved CLIC launches in CLP with correct Identifier — CLP/Reader flow
